title: T4A COVID-19 amounts - Canada.ca
content:
## T4A COVID-19 amounts :
You may be looking for:
- T4E: Service Canada CERB amounts
You may get a T4A slip if you received or repaid any amounts for:
- Canada Worker Lockdown Benefit (CWLB)
- Canada Recovery Caregiving Benefit (CRCB)
- Canada Recovery Sickness Benefit (CRSB)
- Canada Recovery Benefit (CRB)
- Provincial or territorial COVID-19 financial assistance payments
- Canada Emergency Response Benefit (CERB) with the CRA
- Canada Emergency Student Benefit (CESB)
Benefit amounts received are taxable and must be reported in the year you received them.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
